customers.name: Guest Stay Booker
customers.description: A consumer guest booking homes or rooms for leisure, family, remote-work, or event-based travel. Success means finding a place that feels distinct, trustworthy, fairly priced, and easy to manage if plans change.
careAbout: Finding a stay that matches trip intent, location, and group needs
Trustworthy listing photos, amenities, and house rules
Transparent all-in pricing and cancellation terms
Fast booking with confidence in host responsiveness
Useful messaging and issue recovery before and during the stay
winsThem: Strong search relevance and category-led inspiration
High-quality listing pages with review and host credibility signals
Low-friction checkout with clear pricing and policies
Fair handling of disruptions, cancellations, and support cases
theirFear: Booking a stay that looks better online than in reality
Paying hidden fees or misunderstanding cancellation rules
Getting stuck when a host, check-in, or property issue goes wrong

jobsToBeDone.name: Find and book a stay that feels worth trusting
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Turn a trip idea into a confirmed stay by balancing uniqueness, convenience, price, host quality, and booking confidence.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A confirmed booking with low decision regret and clear expectations before arrival.

steps.step: Explore options that fit trip intent
steps.description: Start from destination, dates, group size, and trip style, then narrow using categories, map, amenities, and availability.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Inspiration & Category Discovery
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Helps guests move from broad trip intent into relevant home types, destinations, and entry paths.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Search, Ranking & Map Browse
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Surfaces the most relevant stays using location, quality, availability, and price signals.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Wishlists & Sharing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Lets guests compare and coordinate shortlisted options with others.

steps.description: Compare properties based on photos, reviews, host reputation, house rules, fees, and cancellation flexibility.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Listing Detail & Review Trust
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Presents listing quality, host trust, policies, and review evidence in one place.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trust, Safety & AirCover
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Adds platform-level protections, risk screening, and confidence signals before booking.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Identity & Verification
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports verified guest and host trust signals that reduce uncertainty.

steps.step: Book with confidence and clear pricing
steps.description: Confirm the stay with transparent fees, payment timing, and a clear path to support if needed.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Booking & Checkout
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Handles reservation creation, payment selection, confirmation, and policy explanation.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Payments, Taxes & Payouts
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Enables payment processing, fee explanation, tax handling, and refund logic.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trip Messaging & Itinerary
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides confirmation, itinerary details, and pre-stay coordination.

jobsToBeDone.name: Handle questions, changes, and issues without losing the trip
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Manage communication, check-in uncertainty, changes, or a disrupted stay without fragmented support loops.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A resolved trip outcome with minimal stress, lost time, or financial confusion.

steps.description: Use messaging and itinerary detail to align on check-in, special requests, or small issues.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trip Messaging & Itinerary
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Keeps reservation state, check-in detail, and host communication in one place.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Guest Reviews & Re-engagement
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Builds confidence that issues will matter to later marketplace reputation.

steps.step: Escalate and recover fairly if the stay breaks down
steps.description: Move from self-service and host messaging into platform support, refund, rebooking, or protection flows when needed.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Resolutions & Support
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides structured case handling for refunds, rebooking, and disputes.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trust, Safety & AirCover
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports guest protection, incident handling, and trust-sensitive intervention.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Payments, Taxes & Payouts
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Executes refunds, fee reversals, and compensation flows.

customerJourneyStories.name: Group weekend stay from discovery to issue recovery
customerJourneyStories.summary: A guest uses category discovery and map search to shortlist a distinctive home, books after reviewing trust signals, and later relies on messaging and support to solve a check-in issue.

stages.narrative: A trip opportunity becomes real when the guest aligns dates with friends or family and decides they want a place that feels more flexible or memorable than a standard hotel.
They browse categories, neighborhoods, and map results to move from broad inspiration into a real shortlist of stays.
They inspect the listing page, review quality, fees, cancellation terms, and host credibility to decide whether the place feels trustworthy enough to book.
They test whether checkout feels safe by confirming total price, payment timing, and what happens if plans change.
Before the stay they use itinerary details and host messaging for arrival coordination, and if check-in goes wrong they expect the platform to step in quickly.
A stay that matches the listing, a host who responds well, and a fair resolution process make the guest likely to start the next trip on Airbnb again.

top.name: Guest booking conversion
top.description: Increase guest search-session to booking conversion to about 4.7% in priority markets by improving listing trust and checkout clarity.

children.name: Listing trust score
children.description: Composite measure of guests reporting that the stay matched expectations, targeted above 92%.

children.name: Price transparency score
children.description: Share of guests saying fees and cancellation terms were clear before booking, targeted above 90%.

children.name: Checkout completion
children.description: Share of started bookings that complete successfully, targeted at 72% or better.

children.name: Support-free issue recovery
children.description: Share of guest issues resolved through host coordination or self-service without escalated manual cases, targeted at 68%.

top.name: Booked nights per active guest
top.description: Grow repeat booked nights per active guest above 2.3 annually in focus cohorts.

children.name: Gross Booking Value growth
children.description: Sustain double-digit growth in booked-stay value with a working target of 11% year over year.

children.name: Net revenue per booked night
children.description: Maintain revenue efficiency near $23 per booked night after refunds and incentives.

children.name: Repeat-booker rate
children.description: Increase the share of active guests who book again within 12 months to 53%.

children.name: Mobile app booking share
children.description: Keep app share at or above 64% of booked nights to support lower-friction repeat demand.

productStrategy.vision: Make Airbnb the default place to discover and book distinctive stays that feel safer and easier than guests expect from peer-to-peer lodging.

1_year.focus: Reduce decision friction in discovery, listing trust, and checkout.

businessKPI.northStar: Booked nights per active guest above 2.3
supporting: Net revenue per booked night near $23

strategicMilestones: Unify total-price and cancellation explanation patterns
Improve listing-trust ranking inputs
Make trip messaging and issue-entry flows easier to reach

3_year.focus: Deepen repeat usage and multi-person trip planning.
3_year.productTheme: Guest retention through trust and utility

businessKPI.northStar: Gross Booking Value growth sustained above market
supporting: Booked nights per active guest to 2.6

strategicMilestones: Team trip-planning flows become first-class
Issue recovery becomes more self-serve
Guest identity and trust signals become more predictive

5_year.focus: Make Airbnb the most trusted home-stay operating system for repeat global leisure travel.

customerKPI.northStar: More than 60% of active guests book again within 12 months

businessKPI.northStar: Long-run profitable booked-night growth with strong repeat economics
supporting: Lower acquisition dependency per repeat booking
Higher contribution margin per active guest

strategicMilestones: Trust and support become a competitive moat
Guest identity and preferences travel seamlessly across stays
Airbnb becomes the highest-confidence global hosted-stays brand

customers.name: Everyday Home Host
customers.description: An individual host listing one or a small number of homes or rooms. Success means setting up quickly, attracting trustworthy bookings, running the place without operational overload, and feeling financially and operationally protected.
careAbout: Simple onboarding and clear listing setup guidance
Strong support when damage, fraud, or disruption happens
winsThem: Fast time to first listing and first booking
Easy content authoring and photo quality help
Pricing and discount suggestions they can understand
theirFear: Letting the wrong guest into their home
Getting burdened by complex rules, pricing, or local requirements
Losing money or time when a stay goes wrong

jobsToBeDone.name: Launch a listing and earn bookings without becoming a full-time operator
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Publish a home or room, set pricing and availability, and begin getting bookable demand with manageable setup effort.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A live listing that reaches first booking quickly and keeps occupancy healthy without excessive manual work.

steps.step: Get approved and create the listing
steps.description: Move through onboarding, identity, listing details, house rules, and content guidance.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Host Onboarding & Verification
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Reduces activation friction while collecting the identity, policy, and readiness signals needed to go live.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Listing Authoring & Content
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Guides hosts through photos, titles, amenities, check-in info, and policies.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Local Compliance & Policy Controls
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Explains where local rules, permits, or restrictions affect listing eligibility.

steps.step: Set calendar and pricing with confidence
steps.description: Make the home bookable using availability settings, discounts, stay rules, and suggested pricing.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Calendar & Availability
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Controls booking windows, blocked dates, minimum stays, and availability accuracy.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Pricing & Discounts
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Helps hosts set rates, promotions, and rule-based adjustments without losing margin visibility.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Marketplace Intelligence & Experimentation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supplies demand insight, pricing guidance, and search-performance analytics.

steps.step: Start hosting and learn what improves demand
steps.description: Respond to inquiries, secure first bookings, and understand how quality and responsiveness affect growth.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Host Performance & Earnings
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows occupancy, earnings, response, and listing-quality signals in host language.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trip Messaging & Itinerary
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports guest communication and pre-arrival coordination after the booking is made.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Guest Reviews & Re-engagement
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Turns stay quality into review reputation and search momentum.

jobsToBeDone.name: Run hosting safely and get paid reliably
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Operate the listing with confidence in screening, payouts, protection, and fair support when exceptions happen.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Low-stress hosting with predictable earnings and confidence that the platform helps when things go wrong.

steps.step: Screen demand and host with the right controls
steps.description: Accept the right reservations while understanding guest verification and house-rule risk.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Identity & Verification
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports verified identities and core screening signals before a stay is accepted.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trust, Safety & AirCover
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides screening, protections, and host-confidence policies during risky moments.

steps.step: Get paid and understand the economics
steps.description: Track payouts, fees, taxes, and changes after check-in or issue handling.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Payments, Taxes & Payouts
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Handles host payout timing, service-fee logic, taxes, and refund impacts.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Host Performance & Earnings
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Makes earnings and booking economics legible without finance expertise.

steps.step: Recover from damage, disputes, or cancellations
steps.description: Use support, AirCover, and resolution flows when a booking becomes costly or unsafe.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Resolutions & Support
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides claims, cancellations, refunds, and support case handling.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trust, Safety & AirCover
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports safety escalation, host protection, and damage-recovery workflows.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Turnover & Operations Coordination
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Helps hosts coordinate cleaning and readiness after disrupted or high-friction stays.

customerJourneyStories.name: First-time host activation to first protected payout
customerJourneyStories.summary: A new host creates a listing, uses pricing and calendar guidance to go live, accepts an early reservation, and later relies on AirCover and support confidence to keep hosting.

stages.narrative: A host decides they want to earn from extra space but is unsure whether the work and risk will be worth it.
They explore host onboarding, fee explanations, and examples of what they need to publish a real listing.
They decide whether Airbnb feels safe and simple enough by judging pricing tools, calendar control, guest screening, and protection features.
They create the listing, set availability and price, and respond to the first inquiries while learning how much manual work the platform expects.
Once bookings start, they use messaging, earnings dashboards, and house-rule controls to run the place more confidently.
Hosts stay and grow when payouts feel predictable, issues are handled fairly, and the marketplace rewards responsiveness and quality.

top.name: Time to first booking
top.description: Reduce median time from published listing to first confirmed booking to 21 days in focus markets.

children.name: Host activation rate
children.description: Share of started host setups that become live, targeted at 61%.

children.name: Calendar accuracy rate
children.description: Share of active listings with availability accuracy above target, aimed at 97%.

children.name: Host protection confidence
children.description: Share of hosts who say they understand platform protections and trust them, targeted above 85%.

children.name: Payout predictability
children.description: Share of bookings where payout timing matches host expectation, targeted above 98%.

top.name: Active listing quality rate
top.description: Increase the share of live listings meeting booking, quality, and trust thresholds to 74%.

children.name: New host 90-day retention
children.description: Keep at least 66% of new live hosts active after 90 days.

children.name: First-year listing survival
children.description: Keep 58% or more of newly launched listings live after one year.

children.name: Occupancy-adjusted earnings
children.description: Increase median host earnings per available booked night by 8% year over year.

children.name: Superhost progression
children.description: Grow the share of eligible hosts reaching or maintaining high-quality status to 29%.

productStrategy.vision: Make hosting on Airbnb feel simple enough for everyday hosts while preserving the trust and operational quality needed for repeat guest demand.

1_year.focus: Reduce setup friction and improve host confidence in protection and payouts.

customerKPI.northStar: Median time to first booking to 21 days

strategicMilestones: Streamline listing setup and verification
Clarify payout timing and fee explanation
Improve AirCover and support entry points for hosts

3_year.focus: Automate more of the host operating burden while improving quality thresholds.

customerKPI.northStar: Calendar accuracy to 98% and first-booking speed below 18 days

revenueStreams: Improved supply quality and lower issue cost

strategicMilestones: Pricing and availability become more guided
House rules and risk preferences become easier to configure
Claims and support resolution become faster and more transparent

5_year.focus: Make Airbnb the most trusted operating system for small-scale hosting.

customerKPI.northStar: Hosts can launch and operate profitably with minimal manual burden

revenueStreams: Higher-value repeat demand on trusted supply
supporting: Lower support cost per booked night

strategicMilestones: AirCover becomes a major supply moat
Hosts operate with clearer, more adaptive automation
Airbnb leads the market in trusted hosted-home supply quality

customers.name: Professional Host / Co-host Operator
customers.description: A professional operator, boutique manager, or co-host business running multiple listings across one or more markets. Success means portfolio-level occupancy, disciplined operations, staff permissions, issue control, and dependable revenue performance.
careAbout: Managing many listings, calendars, and staff roles in one system
Strong occupancy without losing margin through bad discounting
Operational SLA control for cleaning, check-in, and support
Clear earnings, payouts, and exception handling at portfolio level
Tools that scale better than consumer-grade single-host workflows
winsThem: Operational issue queues and standardized workflows
Clear payout reconciliation and reservation exports
Scalable trust, support, and compliance controls
theirFear: Outgrowing Airbnb's operating tools and needing too much manual work
Losing occupancy or margin because performance drivers are opaque
Operational incidents damaging reputation across multiple listings at once

jobsToBeDone.name: Operate a portfolio of listings for profitable occupancy
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Manage multiple homes, calendars, staff permissions, and pricing decisions in a way that drives consistent portfolio performance.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: High occupancy and reliable gross margin without operational chaos.

steps.step: Structure the portfolio and assign responsibilities
steps.description: Set up multiple listings, assign co-hosts, and define who can manage content, messaging, or operations.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Co-host Network & Permissions
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides role-based access, listing-level permissions, and operator collaboration.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Listing Authoring & Content
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Standardizes content quality across a portfolio.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Partner APIs & Channel Connectivity
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports portfolio sync, operational exports, and external-system integration where needed.

steps.description: Tune prices, discounts, stay rules, and availability using portfolio analytics and market signals.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Pricing & Discounts
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports portfolio-level pricing actions, promotional treatment, and rate discipline.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Calendar & Availability
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Maintains accurate availability and booking-window controls across listings.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Host Performance & Earnings
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Gives operators visibility into occupancy, earnings, listing quality, and portfolio outliers.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Marketplace Intelligence & Experimentation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides demand, search, and market signals that help operators make more rational pricing and content decisions.

steps.description: Coordinate cleaning, check-in, guest communication, and readiness workflows at portfolio scale.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Turnover & Operations Coordination
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Tracks readiness tasks, changeovers, and local operating routines.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trip Messaging & Itinerary
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Keeps guest communication and pre-arrival coordination standardized.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Co-host Network & Permissions
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Ensures the right local operator can act on the right reservation.

jobsToBeDone.name: Control exceptions, compliance, and portfolio risk
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Resolve damage, fraud, cancellations, and local policy obligations without losing control of the broader business.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A portfolio that stays compliant, protected, and financially predictable even when incidents happen.

steps.description: Identify unsafe bookings, problematic guests, or policy violations before they spread across the portfolio.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Identity & Verification
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides identity and screening context at the reservation level.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Trust, Safety & AirCover
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Flags risky demand, supports enforcement, and protects operators when incidents occur.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Local Compliance & Policy Controls
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Keeps listing- and market-level operating rules visible and enforceable.

steps.description: Work through refunds, claims, support cases, and payout reconciliation with minimal manual fragmentation.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Resolutions & Support
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides structured case management for support, claims, and booking exceptions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Payments, Taxes & Payouts
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Keeps refunds, payouts, tax detail, and financial reconciliation consistent.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Host Performance & Earnings
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows the portfolio-level impact of incidents, payouts, and cancellations.

customerJourneyStories.name: Growing from a few listings to a managed portfolio
customerJourneyStories.summary: A professional host expands from a few homes into a real operating portfolio, adds co-hosts and workflows, and depends on portfolio analytics, issue queues, and payout reconciliation to stay profitable.

stages.narrative: The operator reaches a scale where single-host workflows break down and consistent multi-listing control becomes necessary.
They evaluate whether Airbnb offers enough portfolio management, pricing discipline, and operational visibility to remain the primary platform for growth.
They compare permissions, pricing tools, support quality, and reconciliation transparency to decide whether the workflow can scale.
They introduce co-hosts, restructure listing ownership, and standardize operating routines while watching whether occupancy and service quality improve.
The portfolio runs daily through dashboards, pricing actions, operations tasks, and guest issue handling; every exception tests whether Airbnb behaves like a professional operating system.
Operators keep investing in Airbnb when performance drivers are understandable, issue recovery is controlled, and the platform does not punish them with needless operational overhead.

top.name: Portfolio revenue per available night
top.description: Increase portfolio revenue per available night by 9% year over year in focus operator cohorts.

children.name: Multi-listing occupancy
children.description: Keep occupancy above 71% in focus markets while maintaining quality thresholds.

children.description: Improve booking volume gained per visibility impression by 7% year over year.

children.name: Resolution cycle time

top.description: Grow professionally operated active listings meeting trust and quality thresholds by 12% annually.

children.name: Portfolio retention

children.name: Co-host adoption

children.name: Cancellation-adjusted revenue

children.name: Damage-case recovery time
children.description: Resolve standard covered operator damage cases within 14 days on median.
